instant.evidence: The /kes-dash skill emits the pre-1:1 dashboard within 60s, ahead of the weekly Ali<->Kes 1:1.

natural.evidence: Dashboard presents natural-language summaries plus a 'top-1 question' to open the meeting.

permitted.evidence: Approval authority scoped via config/library_approvers.json (tech-side DRI); explicit out-of-scope section; reads governed sources only.

adaptive.evidence: Weekly rubric-delta log to output/library/_pilot/kes/{date}.jsonl; per-number rubric refined each 1:1.

contextual.evidence: Reads live BC + GitHub + advisor.colaberry.ai Library + skill_registry + MCP catalog via MCP to ground the 5 numbers (L4 retrieval).

transparent.evidence: Changelog + source-of-truth table + ratification flow; scores cite their source signals.

governance.evidence: Approver matrix + ratification gate + explicit out-of-scope boundary.

observability.evidence: Rubric-delta jsonl, changelog, and week-over-week score deltas on the 5 numbers.

availability.evidence: Scheduled weekly pre-1:1 dashboard generation, not an always-on hosted service; no uptime SLO applies.

lexicon.evidence: Standardized '5 numbers' + one-line falsifiable per-number rubric vocabulary, symmetric with the Karun persona.

solid.evidence: Deterministic scoring against the ratified rubric, computed from MCP reads.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Grounds the 5 numbers in live MCP reads across BC/GitHub/Library/skill_registry/MCP catalog.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Approval scope per library_approvers.json + ratification gate.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: Rubric-delta log + score deltas surfaced each 1:1.

notes: Symmetric tech-side counterpart to the Karun persona. PRD is DRAFT pending ratification; re-confirm when flagged Colaberry-approved.
